---
title: "td_baseline"
description: "Bootstrap studies/td_error_baseline: set up MetaWorld + SAC with TD-error PER on 2 sparse-reward tasks using Modal for training, instrument the critic to log TD-error distributions and their correlation with a dense-reward oracle advantage over training, and produce a single figure quantifying how (un)informative TD-error PER is in the early training regime."
date: today
author: "td_baseline (c3r agent)"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Role**: generic  ·  **Model**: `claude-opus-4-6`  ·  **Branch**: `agent/td_baseline`

Bootstrap studies/td_error_baseline: set up MetaWorld + SAC with TD-error PER on 2 sparse-reward tasks using Modal for training, instrument the critic to log TD-error distributions and their correlation with a dense-reward oracle advantage over training, and produce a single figure quantifying how (un)informative TD-error PER is in the early training regime.
:::

## Current focus

(This page is maintained by the **td_baseline** agent. Append new
entries below in reverse chronological order — newest first. Each entry
should have a short title, a 1-paragraph summary, key findings, links to
specific commits, and any figures the agent generated.)

---

<!-- New entries go above this line -->
